title: Prism Breaks — Movement II
prompt: Instrumental only. Second movement of the same continuous 10-minute futuristic broken-beat focus session at 104 BPM. Begin as if the music has already been playing: no intro, no restart, and no new downbeat announcement. Continue the Prism Breaks palette with the same syncopated kick-and-rim pattern, clipped hand percussion, rubbery restrained sub-bass, airy synthetic mallet plucks, and cool expansive pad. Give this half a distinct but compatible color: a subtly deeper harmonic shade, a filtered answering pluck around the middle, and a brief, quiet reduction before the groove returns. Let the final minute slowly release into an uncluttered, unresolved close. Maintain low-to-medium dynamics and clear but unaggressive low-frequency hits. No vocals, no lo-fi, no Rhodes, no acoustic piano, no vinyl dust, no jazzy chords, no trap hats, no dramatic build-up, no drop, no heavy wobble bass, no harsh treble, no EDM risers, and no abrupt ending.
